name: zindex_archive_init
description: zIndexArchive::Init opens an archive file for read access, loads the trailing index on success, and reports the Win32 error path while returning zero when CreateFileA fails.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?Init@zIndexArchive@@QAEHPBD@Z at 0x4a61d0 still fails: 102 unmasked mismatches, 32 relocation bytes masked, 1 trailing VC NOP byte trimmed, BN size 149 bytes, VC object symbol size 144 bytes.

Reviewed difference is Win32 import staging and error-report path shape around CreateFileA, GetLastError, FormatMessageA, ReportOld, and LocalFree. The native archive mount smoke exercises the successful CreateFileA and LoadIndexFromTail path through MountIndexArchive.
